topic: Since / For (Time Expressions with Perfect Tenses)

questions.hindi: मैं दो साल से यहाँ रह रहा हूँ।
questions.english: I have been living here for two years.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Have/Has/Had + been + V-ing/V3 + for + duration | ... + since + starting point
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I have been living here for two years."
questions.grammarRule: Since / For (Time Expressions with Perfect Tenses)
questions.category: Since / For (Time Expressions with Perfect Tenses) practice
